title: ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions:
ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
